raw_data.name: Sarah Chen
raw_data.source_notes: Hot lead - met at networking event
raw_data.notes: Hot lead - met at networking event

draft.subject: Quick question about speed-to-lead for Portland Realty Group
draft.body_text:
Hi Sarah,

Saw you're running as an independent agent in Portland and wanted to reach out directly.

I help real estate teams solve the speed-to-lead problem — getting inquiries routed and responded to instantly, with first follow-ups drafted automatically.

No setup headaches. I build the system around how you already work.

If this is on your radar, happy to hop on a quick call to walk through what it looks like. No pressure.

Best,
Austin

P.S. First 30 days of monitoring and optimization are included.

draft.subject: Speed-to-lead system for Keller Williams Portland
draft.body_text:
Hi Marcus,

Quick question: How fast are your agents responding to new inquiries?

I work with real estate teams to automate that first touch — instant responses, proper routing, and drafted follow-ups that you can customize.

The install takes 2-5 business days. First 30 days of monitoring included.

If this sounds like something you've been thinking about, I'd love to share a quick overview. No sales pitch.

Best,
Austin
